MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Henry Howard Shain, Esq. represented Plaintiff Jean Claude Lair and there being no appearance by Defendant David Scott Winn, the matter is ordered off calendar, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
